pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh logic requiring exactly 1 of each of the 3 ingredients.
Task instructions explicitly demanding 1x Whey Protein Powder.
Task instructions explicitly demanding 1x Peanut Butter.
Task instructions explicitly demanding 1x Oat Milk.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target Nutrition Plan ('Lean Bulk Plan') and Meal ('Morning Power Shake') are synthetically generated and populated with exactly 3 Whey, 2 Peanut Butter, and 1 Oat Milk entries via Django ORM in setup_task.sh. Removing duplicates results in exactly 1 of each ingredient (3 total items), verifying all count metadata. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
